final:
// // This is a 4-to-1 demultiplexer that selects one of four input signals (X0, X1, X2, X3) based on the values of two select lines (S0, S1). The output (Y) will reflect the chosen input: if S1S0 = 00, Y = X0; if S1S0 = 01, Y = X1; if S1S0 = 10, Y = X2; and if S1S0 = 11, Y = X3.
module top_module(
  input X0,
  input X1,
  input X2,
  input X3,
  input S0,
  input S1,
  output Y
);assign Y = (S1 & S0) ? X3 :
             (S1 & ~S0) ? X2 :
             (~S1 & S0) ? X1 :
             X0;

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This is a 4-to-1 demultiplexer that selects one of four input signals (X0, X1, X2, X3) based on the values of two select lines (S0, S1). The output (Y) will reflect the chosen input: if S1S0 = 00, Y = X0; if S1S0 = 01, Y = X1; if S1S0 = 10, Y = X2; and if S1S0 = 11, Y = X3.
